sources.note: More than 500 public comments on Stak Energy's North Slope AI data center lease application; fewer than a dozen supportive; Boyle (Stak CSO) quote on form letters; ~1 sq mi footprint, ~25 mi south of Deadhorse.
Original reporting on the opposition flood and the comment-deadline extension to July 17, 2026.

~$500M initial site/engineering cost, 1 to 3 GW gas-fired generation range, acreage and gravel-fill figures drawn from DNR lease documents (ADL 422741). Advocacy source; figures attributed accordingly, not stated as independently verified state totals.
Origin reporting on the Stak Energy proposal; company's own 'over $10 billion' full-build cost estimate.
